# References {.unnumbered}

## Module 7.1 References

- Casselton, L.A., Olesnicky, N.S., 1998. Molecular Genetics of Mating Recognition in Basidiomycete Fungi. Microbiology and Molecular Biology Reviews, 62(1): 55-70. https://doi.org/10.1128/mmbr.62.1.55-70.1998
- Cambareri, E.B., Singer, M.J., Selker, E.U., 1991. Recurrence of repeat-induced point mutation (RIP) in Neurospora crassa. Genetics, 127(4): 699-710. https://doi.org/10.1093/genetics/127.4.699
- Metzenberg, R.L., Glass, N.L., 1990. Mating type and mating strategies in Neurospora. BioEssays, 12(2): 53-59. https://doi.org/10.1002/bies.950120202
